mapper.select: SELECT l.line_id, l.remaining_data, COALESCE(SUM(fsud.contribution_amount), 0) AS personal_contribution FROM LINE l LEFT JOIN FAMILY_SHARED_USAGE_DAILY fsud ON l.line_id = fsud.line_id AND DATE_FORMAT(fsud.usage_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE(), '%Y-%m') WHERE l.line_id = #{lineId} AND l.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY l.line_id, l.remaining_data

SELECT f.family_id, f.pool_base_data, f.pool_total_data, f.pool_remaining_data, COALESCE(SUM(fsud.usage_amount), 0) AS monthly_usage_amount, COALESCE(SUM(fsud.contribution_amount), 0) AS monthly_contribution_amount FROM FAMILY f LEFT JOIN FAMILY_SHARED_USAGE_DAILY fsud ON f.family_id = fsud.family_id AND DATE_FORMAT(fsud.usage_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE(), '%Y-%m') WHERE f.family_id = #{familyId} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY f.family_id, f.pool_base_data, f.pool_total_data, f.pool_remaining_data
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FAMILY_SHARED_USAGE_DAILY (usage_date, family_id, line_id, contribution_amount, usage_amount, created_at) VALUES (CURRENT_DATE(), #{familyId}, #{lineId}, #{amount}, 0, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE contribution_amount = contribution_amount + #{amount}, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT p.basic_data_amount, l.remaining_data, f.pool_total_data, f.pool_remaining_data FROM LINE l INNER JOIN PLAN p ON l.plan_id = p.plan_id INNER JOIN FAMILY_LINE fl ON l.line_id = fl.line_id INNER JOIN FAMILY f ON fl.family_id = f.family_id WHERE l.line_id = #{lineId} AND f.family_id = #{familyId} AND l.deleted_at IS NULL AND f.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT f.pool_base_data, f.pool_total_data, f.pool_remaining_data, COALESCE(SUM(fsud.contribution_amount), 0) AS monthly_contribution_amount FROM FAMILY f LEFT JOIN FAMILY_SHARED_USAGE_DAILY fsud ON f.family_id = fsud.family_id AND DATE_FORMAT(fsud.usage_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE(), '%Y-%m') WHERE f.family_id = #{familyId} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY f.family_id, f.pool_base_data, f.pool_total_data, f.pool_remaining_data
SELECT f.family_threshold, f.is_threshold_active, f.pool_total_data, f.pool_remaining_data FROM FAMILY f WHERE f.family_id = #{familyId} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE FAMILY SET family_threshold = #{newThreshold}, is_threshold_active = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE family_id = #{familyId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT remaining_data FROM LINE WHERE line_id = #{lineId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT shared_data_limit FROM LINE_LIMIT WHERE line_id = #{lineId} AND is_shared_limit_active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT f.pool_total_data FROM FAMILY f WHERE f.family_id = #{familyId} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT u.user_name AS userName, l.phone AS phoneNumber, COALESCE(SUM(fsud.usage_amount), 0) AS monthlySharedPoolUsage, l.line_id AS lineId FROM FAMILY_LINE fl JOIN FAMILY f ON f.family_id = fl.family_id AND f.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN LINE l ON l.line_id = fl.line_id AND l.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN USERS u ON u.user_id = l.user_id AND u.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN FAMILY_SHARED_USAGE_DAILY fsud ON fsud.family_id = fl.family_id AND fsud.line_id = fl.line_id AND fsud.deleted_at IS NULL AND fsud.usage_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AND fsud.usage_date < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) WHERE fl.family_id = #{familyId} GROUP BY u.user_name, l.phone, l.line_id

SELECT 'USAGE' AS eventType, '데이터 사용' AS title, u.user_name AS userName, DATE_FORMAT(fsud.usage_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS occurredAt, fsud.usage_amount AS amount, 'DAY' AS `precision` FROM FAMILY_SHARED_USAGE_DAILY fsud JOIN LINE l ON l.line_id = fsud.line_id AND l.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN USERS u ON u.user_id = l.user_id AND u.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE fsud.family_id = #{familyId} AND fsud.usage_date >= #{startDate} AND fsud.usage_date < #{endDate} AND fsud.usage_amount > 0 AND fsud.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY fsud.usage_date DESC, fsud.line_id ASC

SELECT 'CONTRIBUTION' AS eventType, '데이터 보태기' AS title, u.user_name AS userName, DATE_FORMAT(fsud.usage_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS occurredAt, fsud.contribution_amount AS amount, 'DAY' AS `precision` FROM FAMILY_SHARED_USAGE_DAILY fsud JOIN LINE l ON l.line_id = fsud.line_id AND l.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN USERS u ON u.user_id = l.user_id AND u.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE fsud.family_id = #{familyId} AND fsud.usage_date >= #{startDate} AND fsud.usage_date < #{endDate} AND fsud.contribution_amount > 0 AND fsud.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY fsud.usage_date DESC, fsud.line_id ASC
